== Notes for [[Item:Q84241|Q84241]] ==

* Freed Slave & Adopted Son of [http://www.geni.com/people/Abu-Hudhaifah-bin-Utbah-ar-Rabi-ah/6000000018620763696/ Abu Hudhaifah bin 'Utbah] & [http://www.geni.com/people/Sahla-binte-Suhail/6000000018620594928/ Sahla binte Suhail].

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Salim_mawla_Abu_Hudaifa

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3144CEF291EFBC189822EF79916C2DEA
geni:6000000018621667219

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
